Thodari Oorellam Kekkude Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Shreya Ghoshal & Maria Roe

Oorellam Kekkude
en paattuthaan.
kuyil ellaam pogudhey
thalai aattithaan.

thendral isai aagudhae
pookkal jadhi solludhe
aarellaam raagamaai
odudhey.
megangal thazhamthaan
podudhey.

Oorellam Kekkude
en paattuthaan.
kuyil ellaam pogudhey
thalai aattithaan.

Oorellam Kekkude
en paattuthaan.
kuyil ellaam pogudhey
thalai aattithaan.

every body all around
listens to my song.
birds in the tree's
vishil it a long..

winds blow around
to my beat flowers are bound

rivers flow singing
my lullaby.
clouds gets to my rhythm
in the sky. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oorellam Kekkude'?

The song conveys a deep sense of love and connection, celebrating the beauty of togetherness.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thodari'?

In Thodari, this song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of 'Oorellam Kekkude'?

The song is sung by the talented Shreya Ghoshal and Maria Roe.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Oorellam Kekkude' was composed by D Imman, known for his melodious tunes.

When was 'Oorellam Kekkude' released?

The song was released on June 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Oorellam Kekkude', the enchanting voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Maria Roe create a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song beautifully illustrates the emotions of love and connection, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in the movie Thodari. With D Imman's captivating composition, it evokes feelings of warmth and nostalgia. This melody is not just a song; it's an experience that lingers in the heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oorellam Kekkude from Thodari is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Maria Roe, this song takes you on a melodic journey filled with heartfelt emotions. The magical composition by D Imman adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Everyone listens to my song. The cuckoo is dancing with joy.
The gentle breeze creates music, and all the flowers are singing together. The clouds are coming down.
When morning comes, the song begins. The evening is filled with the sound of music.
Without my song, no life can fade away.
Without saying my name, the song cannot be sung.
Listening to the music, the night cannot be forgotten.
If my voice is forgotten, the beauty will not shine.
Singing like a joyful cuckoo, it spreads happiness everywhere.
Everybody all around listens to my song. Birds in the trees are singing along.
Winds blow around to my beat, flowers are bound.
Rivers flow singing my lullaby. Clouds get to my rhythm in the sky.
